items.title: Is failing to qualify for UCL actually better for Premier League teams?
items.summary: The UCL is the pinnacle of club soccer, but maybe for Premier League teams, it's just an extra headache?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sanju Samson named ICC men’s Player of the Month for March
items.summary: Samson did not get to play in the early part of the tournament but was the standout performer in the big games towards the end and helped India retain the title
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Stokes: Talk of rift with McCullum is 'massive overstatement'
items.summary: England captain uses in-house media to break lengthy silence and reaffirm partnership with head coach
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
